title: HF-SCS at 10 kHz for widespread pain: outcomes from combined cervical and thoracic electrode placements.
study_question: What are long-term outcomes of HF10-SCS at 10 kHz for widespread neuropathic/nociplastic pain?
population_assessed: Patients with widespread neuropathic/nociplastic pain syndromes receiving HF10-SCS.
outcome_measures: Pain relief (NRS), disability (RMDQ), working capacity, opioid use, patient satisfaction.
inclusion_criteria: Widespread neuropathic/nociplastic pain, combined cervical and thoracic HF10-SCS trial.
answer_to_study_question: HF10-SCS provides long-term widespread pain relief with improved return to work and opiate reductions.
